UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: User profile information stored in Firestore.

role.description: The user's role in the application.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

Transaction.title: Financial Transaction
Transaction.description: A single financial transaction (income or expense).

category.description: The category of the transaction (e.g., Food, Salary).

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the transaction occurred.

Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: A financial asset owned by the user.

Liability.title: Liability
Liability.description: A financial liability (debt) owed by the user.

/users/{uid}/transactions/{transactionId.description: Subcollection of financial transactions for a specific user.

/users/{uid}/assets/{assetId}.description: Subcollection of assets for a specific user.

/users/{uid}/liabilities/{liabilityId}.description: Subcollection of liabilities for a specific user.
